metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite: 7 skills + 10 commands. Explicit presentation and ETA controls, external review, read-only Codex delegation, and confirmation-gated deep onboarding.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, time-left, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc, deep-onboarding. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:time-left, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc, /omg:deep-onboarding. Deep onboarding analyzes first, interviews for missing context, and writes project-map/ADR/handoff documents only to an explicitly confirmed output path. models.yml remains untouched.
